name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Set Windows System File with Attrib
notes:
This Building Block detects files are marked as a system file using the attrib.exe utility.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Set Files as System Files Using Attrib.EXE
SIGMA Description: Detects the execution of "attrib" with the "+s" flag to mark files as system files


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Set Windows System File with Attrib on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [attrib.exe or ATTRIB.EXE]
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '% +s %' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Set Windows System File with Attrib on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [attrib.exe or ATTRIB.EXE]
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '% +s %' AQL filter query
